minecraft:emitter_initialization.creation_expression: v.white.r = 1; v.white.g = 1; v.white.b = 1; v.face_color = v.face_color ?? v.white; v.edge_color = v.edge_color ?? v.white; v.face_alpha = v.face_alpha ?? 0.2; v.inner_alpha = v.inner_alpha ?? 0.5; v.edges_enabled = v.edges_enabled ?? 1; v.stroke = 1 / 32; v.expand = 1 / 32; v.one.x = 1; v.one.y = 1; v.one.z = 1; v.size = v.size ?? v.one; v.zero.x = 0; v.zero.y = 0; v.zero.z = 0; v.center = v.center ?? v.zero;

sequence.expression: t.cx = v.center.x; t.cy = v.center.y; t.cz = v.center.z; t.rx = v.size.x * 0.5 + v.expand; t.ry = v.size.y * 0.5 + v.expand; t.rz = v.size.z * 0.5 + v.expand; t.r = v.face_color.r; t.g = v.face_color.g; t.b = v.face_color.b; t.outer = v.face_alpha; t.inner = math.clamp((v.face_alpha - v.inner_alpha) / (v.face_alpha - 1), 0, 1);

particle_effect.pre_effect_expression: v.fr = t.r; v.fg = t.g; v.fb = t.b; v.fa = t.outer; v.px = t.cx + t.rx; v.py = t.cy; v.pz = t.cz; v.dx = 1; v.dy = 0; v.dz = 0; v.u = t.rz; v.v = t.ry;
v.fr = t.r; v.fg = t.g; v.fb = t.b; v.fa = t.inner; v.px = t.cx + t.rx; v.py = t.cy; v.pz = t.cz; v.dx = -1; v.dy = 0; v.dz = 0; v.u = t.rz; v.v = t.ry;
v.fr = t.r; v.fg = t.g; v.fb = t.b; v.fa = t.outer; v.px = t.cx - t.rx; v.py = t.cy; v.pz = t.cz; v.dx = -1; v.dy = 0; v.dz = 0; v.u = t.rz; v.v = t.ry;
v.fr = t.r; v.fg = t.g; v.fb = t.b; v.fa = t.inner; v.px = t.cx - t.rx; v.py = t.cy; v.pz = t.cz; v.dx = 1; v.dy = 0; v.dz = 0; v.u = t.rz; v.v = t.ry;
